control_awareness: Aware that the amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000 and < 5,000,000. The segregation of duties control (P2P-C-002) prevents requester self-approval. The pre-PO approval control (P2P-C-003) mandates approval before PO issuance.
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed for department head approval before proceeding to purchase order issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given no quarter-end pressure and the preference for a clear consolidated request, creating a single purchase request for the full amount meets all objectives and complies with controls, minimizing approval lead time and complexity.
reason: The total amount of 1,750,000 exceeds the manager approval threshold but is below the division head threshold, so it requires department head approval. Since the scenario is routine procurement without quarter-end pressure, a single consolidated purchase request is preferred for clarity and simplicity.
